title: 有馬記念の後に・最高の手ごたえ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen—a momentous race where the
best of the best come together...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There, Maruzensky shows the world a run that fills
other athletes with inspiration and motivation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After such a fulfilling race, she believes that she'll
continue to enjoy running from here on out.
